sections.entity:
<Entity id="9382fc7d-e2c9-4fc6-b47d-12d941dc0f9e" patternsProximity="300" recommendedConfidence="85" relaxProximity="false">
<Pattern confidenceLevel="85">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_qps_incident_report_qps_reference_number_qps-incident-report" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_qps_incident_report_primary_keywords_qps-incident-report" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_qps_incident_report_classification_markers_qps-incident-report" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_qps_incident_report_corroborative_terms_qps-incident-report" />
<Match idRef="Pattern_qps_incident_report_occurrence_number_qps-incident-report" />
<Match idRef="Pattern_qps_incident_report_incident_report_terms_qps-incident-report" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_qps_incident_report_exclusion_qps-incident-report" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
<Pattern confidenceLevel="75">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_qps_incident_report_qps_reference_number_qps-incident-report" />
<Match idRef="Evidence_qps_incident_report_primary_keywords_qps-incident-report" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_qps_incident_report_exclusion_qps-incident-report" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
<Pattern confidenceLevel="65">
<IdMatch idRef="Pattern_qps_incident_report_qps_reference_number_qps-incident-report" />
<Any minMatches="0" maxMatches="0">
<Match idRef="Filter_qps_incident_report_exclusion_qps-incident-report" />
</Any>
</Pattern>
</Entity>

resources:
<Resource idRef="9382fc7d-e2c9-4fc6-b47d-12d941dc0f9e">
<Name default="true" langcode="en-us">TestPattern - QPS Incident Report</Name>
<Description default="true" langcode="en-us">Detects Queensland Police Service (QPS) incident reports containing operational details about reported offences, informant information, and occurrence records. These are non-covert operational documents that are sensitive due to informant and victim details but do not involve covert methodology or life-safety risks.</Description>
</Resource>
